subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Today the Sun of Manifestation, which hath dawned from the horizon of the heaven of God's Will, shineth resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی امروز آفتاب ظهور که از افق سماء اراده الله اشراق نموده
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
